overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a snowy, fortified mountain village during a foggy night. The character traverses from an open mountain path through a village gate, explores the interior courtyard, climbs wooden stairs through the settlement, and reaches a cliffside overlook above a foggy abyss.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail approaching fortified village

events.description: approaching village outskirts with windmill and wooden fences becoming visible

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the snow-dusted mountain path toward the village entrance

entered.detail: steep rocky mountainside with patches of snow
tall evergreen trees lining the path
wooden windmill structure on the hillside ahead
fortified wooden gate marking the village entrance

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a wide mountain path with rocky cliffs to the right and open vista to the left. Sparse pine trees dot the landscape as the character approaches a fortified village entrance with a wooden windmill visible on the hillside ahead.

events.description: entering the fortified village area with stone and wooden walls
entering the dark wooden gate passage through the fortification wall

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the village entrance and passing under the heavy wooden gate structure

entered.detail: heavy timber gate structure with stone foundations
thick stone walls with wooden palisades on top

segments.scene_description: The scene narrows as Geralt enters the fortified village, passing between stone walls and wooden palisades. The character approaches and enters a dark timber gate structure that leads through the defensive wall into the village interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village courtyard with wooden scaffolding

events.description: exiting the gate into the inner village courtyard with wooden buildings
beginning to ascend wooden stairs between stone buildings

agents.ego_description: Geralt exploring the village interior and climbing wooden staircases between closely packed stone and timber buildings

entered.detail: open muddy area surrounded by wooden and stone buildings
steep wooden staircase leading upward through the village
medieval stone houses with wooden roofs
timber scaffolding and walkways attached to buildings

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges from the gate into a muddy village courtyard surrounded by medieval stone and timber buildings. The character navigates through narrow passages and begins ascending steep wooden stairs that wind upward through the settlement.

events.description: reaching the upper wooden fortification platform with sandbag walls
stopping at the cliff edge to observe the foggy abyss below

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the upper fortifications and stopping at the cliff edge to survey the foggy abyss and distant mountains

entered.detail: elevated wooden platform extending over the cliff edge
defensive fortifications made of stacked sandbags
deep fog-filled chasm below the cliff edge
ruined stone tower visible through the mist

segments.scene_description: Geralt reaches the upper wooden fortifications and walks along a platform lined with sandbag walls. The character stops at the cliff edge overlooking a vast foggy abyss, with a broken tower visible through the mist and the wooden windmill seen in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open mountain path into the claustrophobic depths of a fortified village, eventually ascending to a high cliffside overlook. It begins with Geralt traversing a wide, rocky trail flanked by sparse pine trees and a distant hillside windmill. As the path narrows, the camera follows him through stone walls and a dark timber gate, transitioning from the open wilderness into the enclosed defensive perimeter. The scene then shifts into a muddy courtyard of medieval stone and timber buildings, where the camera tracks upward along steep, winding wooden stairs. Finally, the movement reaches the upper fortifications and a sandbagged platform, stopping at the edge of a vast foggy abyss where a broken tower and the distant windmill emerge through the mist.
